volume_i.title: Civilization
volume_i.description: Volume I discovers the laws of history through the Civilization-facing public orientation layer.

volume_ii.title: Apocalypse
volume_ii.description: Volume II applies the laws of history through the Apocalypse / World War-facing public orientation layer.

museum.title: Predictive History Museum
museum.description: Museum exhibits correspond to chapters across both conceptual volumes; ph-mus is not a third volume.

ph-civ.title: Predictive History: Civilization
ph-civ.description: Volume I public surface: historical pattern formation and discovery of the laws of history through orientation cards, study prompts, paths, and routes.

ph-apo.title: Predictive History: Apocalypse
ph-apo.description: Volume II public surface: application of the laws of history through World War / Apocalypse-facing cards and routes.

ph-mus.title: Predictive History Museum
ph-mus.description: Chapter exhibit layer for both volumes. Large artifact files live outside Git.
